text: I had a chicken breast no wait I mean a grilled chicken thigh and some steamed broccoli
_comment: SELF-CORRECTION: Speaker starts with 'chicken breast', then mid-sentence corrects to 'grilled chicken thigh'. Step 1 LLM must resolve the correction and log only 'grilled chicken thigh', not 'chicken breast'. 'no wait I mean' is the spoken correction marker. Classic voice-to-text mid-sentence revision — tests whether the LLM picks the final intended food, not the abandoned one.
